source.quote: Page size is determined by the server, and clients MUST NOT assume a fixed page size

requirements.exclusion: What a client assumes is internal state; the assumption has no wire footprint (MCP pagination requests carry no size parameter to inspect).

source.quote: Clients MUST treat cursors as opaque tokens: Don't make assumptions about cursor format; Don't attempt to parse or modify cursors; Don't persist cursors across sessions
Invalid cursors SHOULD result in an error with code -32602 (Invalid params).

requirements.exclusion: Whether a cursor is invalid is server-internal knowledge; a trace cannot distinguish a server accepting a stale-but-valid cursor from one silently tolerating an invalid one.
